---
title: "Hello there!"
image: files/profiles/profile.jpg
about: 
  template: jolla
  links:
  - icon: linkedin
    aria-label: linkedin
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/guorui-zhong-754761185/
  - icon: envelope
    aria-label: email
    href: "mailto:zhonggr@bii.a-star.edu.sg"
  - icon: github
    aria-label: github
    href: https://github.com/guoruizhong

---


I'm an post-doctoral research fellow at the [Bioinformatics institute (BII)](https://www.a-star.edu.sg/bii), [A*STAR](https://www.a-star.edu.sg/). The purpose of this blog is to record the things I learned during my research work.
